changes: Added root Bun workspaces for apps/* and packages/*.
Added tsconfig.base.json and converted root tsconfig.json into a compatibility aggregator for the current src/ tree.
Created private workspace manifests and TypeScript configs for apps/cli, apps/dashboard, apps/dashboard-server, packages/core, packages/agents, packages/knowledge, and packages/ui-contract.
Added temporary empty package root exports for packages/core, packages/agents, packages/knowledge, and packages/ui-contract.
Kept root compatibility scripts pointing at the current src/ layout until owner phases move the code.

commands.summary: Workspace packages resolved and bun.lock was refreshed with local workspace entries.
Rerun after pinning packages/agents @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent to 0.78.1; lockfile reported no install changes and avoided an unrelated 0.79.0 duplicate.
Root TypeScript check still passes; root scripts continue to validate the old src/ layout plus UI check.
Root smoke still passes with the workspace scaffold present.
Current dashboard production build still passes and writes src/ui/static/dist.
